name: White Chocolate Chip Macadamia Cookies/la Times
recipeInstructions: Cream together shortening, butter, and sugars in a bowl until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs, water, and vanilla extract. Combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt; stir into the creamed mixture. Fold in chopped macadamia nuts and white chocolate chips by hand. Drop rounded tablespoons of batter onto lightly greased baking sheets. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, watching carefully during the last 5 minutes to prevent over-baking. Makes about 30 large cookies. Each cookie contains approximately: 212 calories; 133 mg sodium; 23 mg cholesterol; 11 grams fat; 27 grams carbohydrates; 2 grams protein; 0.11 gram fiber.
